name: The Lewd Dungeon
description:
A dungeon full of horny monsters, the only escape is deep within the 9th floor of the dungeon.

Content Warning: Dubcon/Noncon, Violence, Monsterfucking, Hypnosis, Brainwashing, Drugging, Breeding, Tentacles

5/14/26: I don't normally enable public chats but i decided to enable it for this one bc i think out of all my bots this would be the best one to try it out. Also remember that you can edit messages to edit the stats if it keeps giving you too many or won't remove statuses when they shouldn't be there anymore.
creator: Kittipaws
